hero.name: devcy0922
hero.tagline: Designed to unify authentication, tenant isolation, model routing, auditability, and security regression testing into a single operational boundary. (Real-time auto-translation and deployment have been validated via the LingoAgent pipeline.)
section.selectedSystems.desc: We've selected only the core systems that form the execution path of the Live Lab. Each document includes design decisions, failure boundaries, and validation methods.
project.govail.title: GoVail Gateway
project.govail.desc: A Rust Gateway that applies SurrealDB Key authentication, model/RPM/DLP policies, LiteLLM routing, and Loki auditing to actual private LLM invocation paths.
project.aegis.title: Aegis-LLM
project.aegis.desc: Designed tenant authentication, request throttling, DLP, Prompt Security, and Upstream Fallback into a single SaaS Control Plane.
project.slicerag.title: SliceRAG
project.slicerag.desc: Stores and retrieves documents only within the project scope defined by the Gateway, blocking cross-tenant access via regression testing.
project.agentsecops.title: AgentSecOps
project.agentsecops.desc: Automatically validates authentication, RAG isolation, PII masking, Prompt Injection blocking, and LLM Fallback using synthetic data.
project.lingo.title: LingoAgent
project.lingo.desc: This page was translated by LingoAgent. It follows a pipeline: ko.json change → LLM translation + ICU validation → GitHub Action auto-commit.
lingo.banner.title: Translated by LingoAgent
lingo.banner.desc: The UI text on this page was automatically generated from ko.json via the LingoAgent pipeline (ICU validation + LLM QA).
